topWPAPlays.description: Trent Grisham doubles (6) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Alejandro Osuna. Cody Bellinger scores. Amed Rosario scores. Ryan McMahon scores.
Ezequiel Duran homers (2) on a fly ball to left field.
Brandon Nimmo singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Trent Grisham. Alejandro Osuna to 3rd.
Danny Jansen challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Ryan McMahon walks. Cody Bellinger to 3rd. Amed Rosario to 2nd.
Cody Bellinger triples (3) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Joc Pederson. Paul Goldschmidt scores.
Keibert Ruiz doubles (7) on a line drive to right fielder Matt Wallner. José Tena scores. Jacob Young scores.
Keibert Ruiz homers (2) on a fly ball to right field.
Josh Bell doubles (6) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Daylen Lile. Ryan Jeffers scores.

Brooks Lee singles on a ground ball to left fielder Daylen Lile. Ryan Jeffers scores. Luke Keaschall scores. Kody Clemens to 3rd.
Kyle Manzardo doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Kyle Isbel. Steven Kwan scores. José Ramírez scores.
Maikel Garcia flies out to right fielder Chase DeLauter.
Nick Loftin doubles (4) on a fly ball to left fielder Steven Kwan. Isaac Collins to 3rd.
Jac Caglianone grounds out to first baseman Kyle Manzardo.
Vinnie Pasquantino strikes out swinging.
Michael Conforto homers (2) on a fly ball to right center field.

Nico Hoerner grounds into a double play, third baseman Ke'Bryan Hayes to second baseman Sal Stewart to first baseman Spencer Steer. Pete Crow-Armstrong to 3rd. Miguel Amaya out at 2nd. Nico Hoerner out at 1st.
Michael Conforto walks. Alex Bregman scores. Ian Happ to 3rd. Michael Busch to 2nd.
Michael Busch singles on a ground ball to right fielder Blake Dunn, deflected by first baseman Spencer Steer. Alex Bregman to 3rd. Ian Happ to 2nd.
Pete Crow-Armstrong singles on a ground ball to center fielder Dane Myers. Michael Conforto scores. Dansby Swanson to 3rd.
Jake McCarthy doubles (6) on a fly ball to center fielder Tyrone Taylor. TJ Rumfield scores. Willi Castro to 3rd.
Troy Johnston singles on a ground ball to right fielder Brett Baty. Brenton Doyle to 3rd.
Umpire reviewed (home run), call on the field was upheld: Jake McCarthy hits a grand slam (2) to right field. Brenton Doyle scores. Ezequiel Tovar scores. Willi Castro scores.
Willi Castro singles on a line drive to right fielder Austin Slater. Tyler Freeman scores. Troy Johnston to 3rd.
Brett Sullivan strikes out on a foul tip.
Ryan O'Hearn singles on a ground ball to right fielder Corbin Carroll, deflected by first baseman Ildemaro Vargas. Brandon Lowe scores. Bryan Reynolds to 3rd.
Jose Fernandez grounds into a double play, shortstop Konnor Griffin to second baseman Brandon Lowe to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Ildemaro Vargas out at 2nd. Jose Fernandez out at 1st.
Joey Bart homers (2) on a line drive to left center field.
Spencer Horwitz singles on a sharp ground ball to right fielder Corbin Carroll. Bryan Reynolds scores. Ryan O'Hearn to 2nd.
Alek Thomas grounds into a double play, second baseman Brandon Lowe to shortstop Konnor Griffin to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. James McCann out at 2nd. Alek Thomas out at 1st.
Shea Langeliers homers (11) on a fly ball to left center field. Nick Kurtz scores.
Brent Rooker homers (4) on a fly ball to left field. Tyler Soderstrom scores.
Jacob Wilson homers (3) on a fly ball to left field. Carlos Cortes scores.
Bryson Stott grounds into a double play, second baseman Jeff McNeil to shortstop Jacob Wilson to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Brandon Marsh out at 2nd. Bryson Stott out at 1st.
Carlos Cortes singles on a ground ball to center fielder Justin Crawford. Tyler Soderstrom scores.
Javier Sanoja reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Coby Mayo. Joe Mack scores.
Pete Alonso singles on a line drive to center fielder Jakob Marsee. Taylor Ward scores. Dylan Beavers to 2nd.
Samuel Basallo grounds into a double play, second baseman Xavier Edwards to shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Liam Hicks. Dylan Beavers to 3rd. Pete Alonso out at 2nd. Samuel Basallo out at 1st.
Liam Hicks homers (9) on a fly ball to right center field. Connor Norby scores.
Gunnar Henderson singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jakob Marsee. Coby Mayo scores. Jeremiah Jackson to 3rd. Gunnar Henderson to 2nd.
Chandler Simpson singles on a ground ball to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela. Junior Caminero scores. Jonny DeLuca scores. Ben Williamson to 2nd.
Connor Wong reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Taylor Walls. Masataka Yoshida scores. Marcelo Mayer to 3rd. Throwing error by shortstop Taylor Walls.
Ceddanne Rafaela singles on a ground ball to shortstop Taylor Walls, deflected by third baseman Junior Caminero. Trevor Story scores. Masataka Yoshida to 2nd.
Jarren Duran grounds into a double play, second baseman Ben Williamson to shortstop Taylor Walls to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Caleb Durbin out at 2nd. Jarren Duran out at 1st.
Ben Williamson singles on a ground ball to right fielder Wilyer Abreu. Jonny DeLuca scores.
Masyn Winn triples (2) on a line drive to right fielder Nick Castellanos. Jordan Walker scores.
Alec Burleson homers (6) on a fly ball to right field.
Jordan Walker doubles (7) on a fly ball to left fielder Ramón Laureano.

Ty France grounds into a double play, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson. Ramón Laureano out at 2nd. Ty France out at 1st.
